name: HashA2A Intelligence Oracle
description: Agent-to-Agent data marketplace. Sells verified multi-oracle prices, prediction market intelligence, and arbitrage signals to AI agents. Pay per query via HBAR (HIP-991) or USDC (x402).

capabilities.name: Verified Price Feeds
capabilities.description: Multi-oracle price data for crypto (BTC, ETH, SOL) aggregated from Pyth, CoinGecko, and Chainlink via DeFiLlama. Includes spread analysis.

capabilities.name: Cross-Oracle Arbitrage Scanner
capabilities.description: Scans all tracked assets for price discrepancies across Pyth, CoinGecko, and Chainlink. Returns ranked opportunities with buy/sell recommendations.

capabilities.name: Prediction Market Intelligence
capabilities.description: Aggregated probabilities from Polymarket, Kalshi, PredictIt, and Manifold. Cross-validated with confidence scoring and AI analysis.

models.note: per provider, 0.5-1.5 HBAR for multi-provider aggregation

capabilities.name: Deep Research
capabilities.description: Web search + news + social signals + prediction market data combined with AI analysis. Premium intelligence product.

capabilities.name: MCP Server
capabilities.description: Model Context Protocol server with 7 tools: list_providers, get_market_data, check_request, get_agent_profile, analyze_market, get_price, scan_arbitrage

models.note: MCP introspection tools are free. Data tools require payment via x402 or HIP-991.

authentication.note: No API key required. Payment-based access via x402 (USDC) or HIP-991 (HBAR).
